name: Zoo Med Can O' Bloodworms Reptile Food, 3.2-oz can
description: With the Zoo Med Can O' Bloodworms Reptile Food, you can treat your finned friends to a convenient, high-protein meal. The bloodworms are cooked in the can to lock in flavor and freshness. With the resealable lid, you can refrigerate the can and reuse it for up to a week, or freeze it for even longer use. The bloodworms are a fin-tastic choice for all aquarium fish, including bettas, angelfish, discus and more. They’re also great for preparing fish for breeding.
